## Fix readiness checklist

- [ ] The bug has a clear expected behavior.
- [ ] The bug has enough reproduction details to verify a fix.
- [ ] The affected macOS and Rectangle versions are listed.
- [ ] Logs, screenshots, or screen recordings are attached if they help explain the issue.
